task_completion.description: Navigate to the vicinity of Horseshoe Bend, Arizona.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main 3D viewport displays the distinctive horseshoe-shaped bend of the Colorado River in a canyon, or the status bar shows coordinates near 36.87°N, 111.51°W.
The compass tool shows North pointing roughly toward the bottom of the screen, or the view is oriented looking 'up' the bend towards the southern horizon.
The view is an oblique 3D perspective (not top-down 2D), showing the depth of the canyon walls and potentially the horizon near the top of the frame.

task_completion.description: Configure camera altitude (Eye alt) to 800-2000 meters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status bar displays 'Eye alt' (or 'Camera') between 800 m and 2000 m (approx. 2600 ft to 6500 ft).
A 'New Placemark' or properties dialog window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Save the placemark with 'Horseshoe' in the name to My Places.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' sidebar (specifically the 'My Places' section) lists a new item containing the text 'Horseshoe' (e.g., 'Horseshoe Bend').

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacts with the application GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Google Earth interface (3D viewer, sidebar, toolbar) rather than a terminal, code editor, or script output.

integrity.description: Verify the placemark name was entered via the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing into the 'Name' field of the placemark dialog, or the dialog is open with the name populated.

integrity.description: Verify the agent created the placemark during the session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'My Places' list does not show the 'Horseshoe' item at the very beginning of the trajectory (before the agent's actions).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: Horseshoe Bend (36.8791°N, 111.5103°W). Visual: U-shaped river canyon. Parameters: Heading 160-200° (South), Tilt 60-80° (Oblique), Altitude 800-2000m (2600-6500ft). Success requires a saved item in 'My Places' named with substring 'Horseshoe'.
